title: YAZAMER (Artificial Intelligence and Intelligent Systems Application and Research Center) - Message from the Director
content:
YAZAMER (Artificial Intelligence and Intelligent Systems Application and Research Center) - Message from the Director

In today's information society, with the rapid development of technology, social and economic changes are taking place and many technological products or applications that can facilitate human life are emerging and being produced. However, the development of data collection methods increases both the resolution of the collected data and the frequency of data collection, thus increasing the density of the collected data. The processing of the intensive data obtained and the interpretation of the data at the end of processing are of great importance in sectors based on cost, time and resource efficiency, especially in health, industry and education. The production of software, which is generally referred to as smart systems and has the ability to make optimum decisions according to the current conditions in industry, and the dissemination of this software as products that will produce added value for our country through industrial collaborations is an indispensable need for the industrial sector, which primarily needs R&D and uses low-medium technology. Similarly, in the field of health informatics, brain-computer interface (BCI) software, which will incorporate disease classification, prediction of treatment results and all these data entry, analysis and interpretation processes through data collected by imaging methods, will be widely used applications in the near future.

The primary objective of YAZAMER is to contribute to the process of developing high value-added products that can realize the technological breakthrough that our country needs by using constantly renewed and accelerating data collection, data analysis, control systems and optimization algorithms. In addition to sharing theoretical and technical knowledge with individuals and institutions, the Center aims to present the physical and virtual (software) products to be obtained for the benefit of society and economy, to disseminate the related processes and to spread them to a wide national base, and to contribute to the scientific, economic and academic development process. YAZAMER aims to direct the experienced education staff of our university in every field in line with the incoming demands, to contribute to the product acquisition and development processes of institutions or academicians who demand in the field of intelligent systems and artificial intelligence by carrying out all its activities with processes such as individual and corporate trainings, certificate programs, pre-programmed seminars, contracted seminars, inter-institutional coordination (Ministries, Local Governments, etc.).

The main mission of the center is to transform academic accumulation into a commercial product that can create added value, contribute to the national economy and academic development, disseminate knowledge to a wide base and conduct interdisciplinary studies with cooperation processes, develop projects and create employment opportunities by taking part in these projects. In line with the objectives of the Center, we invite scientists and future candidates who follow the scientific researches that change and develop every day and who want to be involved in studies that will shed light on the future in this field to work together to be a pioneer in innovation.

YAZAMER Director
